summary: Application entry point and orchestrator: handles CLI flags, config loading, Telegram client setup, message fetching/storage, TUI launch, and LLM summarization
side_effects: Stores/updates messages and sync state in database
notes: Classic orchestrator pattern with 10 packages fan-out. Defines two bridge adapters: registryRefreshAdapter (wraps refresh.Service for source registry) and summarizeServiceAdapter (bridges summarizer.Service to TUI interface). Two execution modes: TUI mode (interactive) and CLI mode (fetch-and-print). Handles signal interruption with context cancellation.
